description: eBay Browse API MCP server — buy-side listing search and price intelligence.
name: io.github.cunicopia-dev/ebay-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Which eBay environment to use: "production" or "sandbox". Defaults to production.
environmentVariables.name: EBAY_ENV

environmentVariables.description: eBay production App ID (Client ID) from your eBay developer account. Required for EBAY_ENV=production.
environmentVariables.name: EBAY_PRD_APP_ID

environmentVariables.description: eBay production Cert ID (Client Secret). Required for EBAY_ENV=production.
environmentVariables.name: EBAY_PRD_CERT_ID

environmentVariables.description: eBay sandbox App ID (Client ID). Required for EBAY_ENV=sandbox.
environmentVariables.name: EBAY_SBX_APP_ID

environmentVariables.description: eBay sandbox Cert ID (Client Secret). Required for EBAY_ENV=sandbox.
environmentVariables.name: EBAY_SBX_CERT_ID

title: eBay Browse
